name: Adapteo Oyj
summary: Adapteo Oyj, together with its subsidiaries, provides adaptable buildings rental and rental related services in Finland, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Germany, the Netherlands, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Business Area Rental Space and Business Area Permanent Space. The company engages in the rental of adaptable buildings, as well as the provision of assembly and other services; and sale and long term leasing of adaptable buildings. The company offers its adaptable buildings to schools, day care centers, offices, accommodation, and events. Adapteo Oyj was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.
